summary: Emit the resource_not_incremental sync warning only for an explicit --since; the automatic stored-cursor re-sync path falls back to full pagination silently.
reason: No Suno list endpoint declares a temporal-filter param, so syncResourceSinceParam is correctly empty and incremental sync always degrades to full pagination. A stored last_synced_at cursor makes every routine `sync` request incremental, so the warning fired on each run — notably for the 'workspace' resource (/api/project/me) — reading as a workspace failure when sync was actually fine. Gating on an explicit --since keeps the informative case (the user's flag had no effect) and removes the routine noise.
